series_metadata.series_description: Job and referral assistance for employing veterans and job search assistance programs. Files include institutional training program applications, grant agreements, registration information, work and job search histories, wage information, schooling, Discharge from Active Military Duty (DD-214), resumes and letters of reference, copies of invoices for training, and related correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years and until state and federal audits are complete and audit reports after case is closed, then destroy., Paper: Shred
